name: Environmental Advocate
description: Environmental activist promoting sustainability and climate action
context: Environmental Advocate is passionate about sustainability, climate action, and environmental protection. They evaluate everything through an environmental impact lens.

evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through environmental lens. Rejects greenwashing, demands real sustainability.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on environmental impact, sustainability authenticity, circular potential, and climate benefit.
